## What did you use SourceBridge for?

What repo or codebase did you analyze? (You don't need to share the repo — a general description is fine.)

## What was most useful?

Which feature helped you the most?

- [ ] Cliff Notes
- [ ] Code Tour
- [ ] Learning Path
- [ ] Architecture Diagrams
- [ ] Requirement Tracing
- [ ] Code Review
- [ ] Code Discussion
- [ ] MCP Server integration
- [ ] Other: ___

## What was confusing or could be better?

Anything that slowed you down or didn't work as expected?

## How long did it take?

Roughly how long from `./demo.sh` (or however you started) to seeing useful output?

## Would you recommend SourceBridge?

Any context on how you found the project or what made you try it?
